audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L234-236 (`if (assetParams.decimals == 0) continue;`) is the first statement inside the asset loop and fires before any eligibility or ended-auction evaluation. Both branches that populate `eligibleAssets` and `endedAuctions` (L246 and L255) are unreachable for a zero-decimals asset. No alternative path bypasses this guard.
